title: 🔥定投安全垫持续增厚
body: 市场处于低估筑底阶段。AHR999 报 0.46 位于定投区，现价 $76,666 低于 200 日定投成本 $80,272，偏离度 -4.5%。当前价格已击穿长线持仓平均成本，显示市场正在通过亏损清洗浮筹，筹码分布向低成本区间集中，估值处于极具性价比位置。中性。底部磨多久？
body_en: The market is in an undervalued, bottom-building phase. AHR999 sits at 0.46, firmly in the accumulation zone. Current price of $76,666 trades below the 200-day DCA cost of $80,272, a -4.5% deviation. Price has sliced below the average long-term holding cost, signaling a shakeout of weak hands. Chip distribution is consolidating at lower levels, making valuations extremely attractive. Neutral. How long will the bottom grind last?
